name: Prize Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the sugar and softened margarine until well combined.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat until smooth.
3. Stir in the milk.
4. Gradually add the flour, baking powder, and salt, mixing until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square pan.
6. For the topping, combine the brown sugar and cinnamon.
7. Sprinkle the topping mixture evenly over the cake batter.
8. Bake at 375 degrees F for 25 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
